hero.name: Yulimar Duque
hero.description: I build mobile apps from zero to production. React Native Developer with 4+ years shipping products to App Store and Google Play.

about.title: The person behind the code
about.bio1: I'm a React Native developer with 4+ years building mobile apps. I've led the full development cycle — from architecture decisions and feature development, to setting up EAS Build, managing App Store Connect and Google Play Console, and shipping real products to production.
about.bio2: I'm passionate about sharing what I learn. Beyond building, I create technical content and practical guides so other developers can shorten their learning curve — especially around the app store publishing process, which is often more complex than it seems.
about.stat1Label: years building mobile apps from zero to production
about.stat2Label: apps shipped to App Store and Google Play with full ownership
about.stat3Label: drive to keep learning and sharing what I learn

products.label: Digital products
products.title:
What I've learned,
now in your hands
products.subtitle: Practical guides based on my real experience shipping apps to production.
products.description: Everything you need to know to publish your app on the App Store and Google Play — without losing your mind. Step by step, with real screenshots and the mistakes I made so you don't have to.
products.feature1: App Store Connect and Google Play Console setup
products.feature2: EAS Build: production builds with Expo
products.feature3: Certificates, provisioning profiles and APK signing
products.feature4: TestFlight and internal testing before launch
products.feature6: Common errors and how to fix them
